item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":2,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.9,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"吊椅7号固定螺栓松动，已更换新螺栓后恢复运行"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"12号吊椅同型号螺栓松动，现场加防松胶处理后恢复运行"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"23号又松了"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"明早6点巡检窗口就关"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"把23号这颗的扭矩值定死发我"}],"abstain_reason":""}
